_comment2: Environment variables always override these values (for CI/dev flexibility).
_comment3: Copy this file to config.json and edit values as needed.

embedding._note_backend: Options: 'sentence-transformers' (local HuggingFace models), 'ollama' (local Ollama/LM Studio server), 'fallback' (simple testing backend)
embedding._note_model: Backend-specific model name. null = use backend default. Examples: 'all-MiniLM-L6-v2', 'nomic-embed-text:latest'
embedding._note_offline: For sentence-transformers only: if true, only use locally cached models (requires TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1)
embedding._note_base_url: For ollama backend only: Ollama or LM Studio server URL

_note_fallback: Embedding dimensions for the fallback backend (testing only)
